# Project Phoenix

A comprehensive modernization project for Enterprise Co.

## Background
Enterprise Co needed to modernize their legacy systems. We're helping them
migrate from on-premise to cloud-native architecture.

## Scope
- Legacy system analysis and documentation
- Cloud architecture design
- Incremental migration strategy
- Staff training and knowledge transfer

## Timeline
Started: January 2025
Expected completion: Q3 2025

## Team
- Lead Architect: Marcus Chen
- Backend Engineers: 3
- DevOps Engineers: 2
- Project Manager: Lisa Park

## Technology Stack
- Kubernetes for container orchestration
- AWS EKS for managed Kubernetes
- PostgreSQL with RDS
- Terraform for infrastructure as code
